failures: paper_cutout_style: No background/sky layer fills the canvas — the viewBox has no backdrop rectangle, so the scene floats on a black void. There are no distinct depth planes (sky, mid-ground, foreground) with flat colored shapes layered in the paper cut-out aesthetic. It's just a coop shape on nothing.

color_variety: The palette is almost entirely warm browns/reds with no dark background values (layer1/layer2) and no lighter contrast values (layer5/layer6/layer7 or cream/sky tones). There is no background fill providing a contrasting dark or light layer, so depth contrast is absent.

complete_scene: The viewBox (~240x280) has no sky background, no ground plane, and no terrain — the coop structure floats in empty (black) space. A complete scene requires at minimum a background fill and a ground element.
